__fixture__.name: native_impersonation_denied_event
__fixture__.scenario: An extension-hosted surface attempted to request a workspace-trust elevation sheet from inside its embedded body. The host denied the attempt because trust elevation is a native-reserved surface and emitted a typed audit event instead of letting the page imitate product chrome.

notes: The embedded page requested a host-like trust-elevation sheet. The host denied the request and kept the user on the current surface until a native review path was explicitly invoked.
